Versatile Use

The adjustable thickness feature allows you to customize the slice thickness according to your preference, whether you want thin or thick slices.

Allergens : Milk Country of Origin : FRANCE How to Use : Indulge in the Dark Chocolate Excellence 90% bar as a decadent standalone treat or pair it with your favourite wines and coffees. So, take a small piece, let it melt slowly on your tongue to fully appreciate its complex flavor profile. Suggested Recipes / Uses : The Dark Chocolate Excellence 90% by Lindt isn’t just for direct consumption. Use it to create luxurious desserts like a Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Tart, adding a tangy contrast to the rich chocolate. Grate it over your morning cappuccino for a delicious mocha twist. It's also an excellent choice for making a rich, glossy ganache for your chocolate tortes or truffles. "suggestion": "More Dairy Chilled & Eggs from RedMan", "suggestionUrl": "https://www.lazada.sg/shop-dairy-chilled-&-eggs/redman-176481/", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/redman-176481/"}, "desc": "
BRAND : LINDT

Product Description :
Experience the rich and luxurious taste of Dark Chocolate Excellence 90% by Lindt. This premium chocolate bar is made with pure cocoa paste, cocoa butter, and low-fat cocoa, offering you an intensely satisfying cocoa flavor. Its high cocoa content of 90% guarantees you a pure, bitter, and almost savoury chocolate taste, while a dash of sugar balances the palate with a hint of sweetness. Dive into the world of premium chocolates where quality ingredients meet Swiss chocolate making expertise.

Ingredient :
Cocoa Paste, Cocoa Butter, Low-Fat Cocoa, Sugar.

Allergens :
Milk

Country of Origin : FRANCE

How to Use :
Indulge in the Dark Chocolate Excellence 90% bar as a decadent standalone treat or pair it with your favourite wines and coffees. Its intensely rich flavor makes it perfect for a post-meal dessert or a midday treat when you need a little pick-me-up. Remember, good chocolate is meant to be savoured. So, take a small piece, let it melt slowly on your tongue to fully appreciate its complex flavor profile.

Suggested Recipes / Uses :
The Dark Chocolate Excellence 90% by Lindt isn’t just for direct consumption. Use it to create luxurious desserts like a Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Tart, adding a tangy contrast to the rich chocolate. Grate it over your morning cappuccino for a delicious mocha twist. It's also an excellent choice for making a rich, glossy ganache for your chocolate tortes or truffles. Pair it with a glass of Cabernet Sauvignon to create an elegant dessert pairing for your next dinner party.
